label: Unsupervised learning

node.label: Unsupervised learning
node.definition: Structure is discovered without task labels through density, clustering, reconstruction, or factorization.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Unsupervised learning is modeled as depending on Datasets, sampling & splits, Latent variables & hidden state and feeding downstream nodes such as Semi-supervised & weak supervision, Self-supervised learning, Causal representation learning.
examples: atlas downstream link to Semi-supervised & weak supervision
atlas downstream link to Self-supervised learning
atlas downstream link to Causal representation learning
limitations: The chosen learning signal and interaction pattern may not match the deployment objective or data-generating process. Its direct dependencies include Datasets, sampling & splits, Latent variables & hidden state.

dependencies.rationale: In this atlas graph, Unsupervised learning has a `uses` dependency on Datasets, sampling & splits because Datasets, sampling & splits is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.

In this atlas graph, Unsupervised learning has a `uses` dependency on Probability theory because Probability theory is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.
